mapper.insert: INSERT INTO board_articles (id, board_type, title, content, author_id, author_name, is_secret, password, status, view_count, created_at, updated_at) VALUES ( #{id}, #{boardType}, #{title}, #{content}, #{authorId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{authorName}, #{isSecret}, #{password, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{viewCount}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
mapper.update: UPDATE board_articles SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, is_secret = #{isSecret}, password = #{password, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, status = #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
